behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names both files (js/core/src/init.svelte.ts, js/core/src/_init.ts), both functions (make_visible_if_not_rendered, determine_visible_components), and the literal strings checked by tests (is_target_node, node.type === 'tabs', 'accordion', open === false, initial_tabs, selectedId).

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction dictates near-exact implementation details: variable name 'selectedId', exact expression 'node.props.props.selected ?? node.props.props.initial_tabs?.[0]?.id', conditions 'child.type === "tabitem"', 'child.props.props.id === selectedId or child.id === selectedId', and 'node.children.forEach' — leaving little for the agent to reason about.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests grep for specific tokens like 'selectedId' or 'selected ??', 'node.children.forEach', 'open === false', 'is_target_node' — a correct alternative that uses different variable names (e.g., 'selected_id') or different iteration (for..of) would fail test_open_accordion_children_visible and test_tabs_selective_visibility.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Fail-to-pass tests (test_tabs_selective_visibility, test_closed_accordion_lazy_load, test_tab_initial_tabs_fallback, test_open_accordion_children_visible) are all string-grep assertions on init.svelte.ts content rather than executing the modified function.

test_not_tautological.reason: Since f2p tests are pure string matching, a stub that contains the required substrings (e.g., comments with 'is_target_node', 'open === false', 'selectedId', 'node.children.forEach') but no real behavior could pass; no behavioral assertion exists.

behavior_in_tests.reason: The _init.ts accordion behavior required in instruction ('Add accordion components to visible_components at initial page load', 'Only call process_children_visibility when open !== false') is not tested at all — no test inspects _init.ts.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with comment '# Fail-to-pass tests' separating p2p from f2p, have descriptive names and docstrings.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task modifies TypeScript logic, no structured data output.

no_typos.reason: File paths (js/core/src/init.svelte.ts, js/core/src/_init.ts) and function names match across instruction, tests, and solution.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names the exact function to modify and prescribes the fix logic step-by-step (e.g., 'Determine the selected tab ID using node.props.props.selected ?? node.props.props.initial_tabs?.[0]?.id'), eliminating localization as part of the task.
